title: South Korea's Kospi sinks over 12% to clock its worst day as Iran conflict fuels risk-off sentiment
summary_full: The Korea Exchange temporarily halted trading for the Kospi index on Wednesday. A circuit breaker was  activated on the Kosdaq as well, which closed 14% lower at 978.44.
summary_public: The Korea Exchange temporarily halted trading for the Kospi index on Wednesday. A circuit breaker was  activated on the Kosdaq as well, which closed 14% lower at 978.44.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: as Iran conflict fuels risk-off sentiment
